full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #29 (2026-05-12)

PULSE
Health: 0.4575 (C). 924 wallets, 183 contributors. 17 memos today vs 136 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
51 reward payments, 326932 PFT distributed to 24 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (48928 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,500 PFT. Highest: rDxG2E...oxuR (10,000 PFT). Lowest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (62,500 PFT, avg 8,929/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (63 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (18.0 memos/day in 1 days). 25 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 79.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-12): 7564 transactions from 65 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
